hero.title: Innovation Lab
hero.description: Bincika demos masu ma'amala, gwaje-gwaje, da nunin fasaha daga ƙungiyar injiniyoyinmu.

hero.title: Innovation Lab
hero.description: Muna bincika iyakokin da suka dace a cikin AI, sarrafa kansa, da tsarin rarrabawa, sannan mu fassara ingantaccen bincike zuwa abin dogaro da ƙarfin samarwa.

researchAreas.title: Yankunan Bincike
researchAreas.description: Kowane yanki mai mayar da hankali ya haɗa binciken bincike tare da hanyoyin aiwatarwa waɗanda aka tsara don tsarin duniya.

detailedFocusBriefs.title: Cikakken bayani game da mayar da hankali
detailedFocusBriefs.description: Ayyukan bincike na kusa da lokaci a halin yanzu suna motsawa daga tabbatar da gine-gine zuwa tsare-tsaren bayarwa.

fromLabToProduction.title: Daga Lab zuwa Production
fromLabToProduction.description: Innovation a Horizon ana auna shi ta hanyar sakamakon jigilar kaya, ba keɓaɓɓun samfuran ba.

roadmap.title: R &D Roadmap
roadmap.description: Ci gaba mai mahimmanci daga haɓaka iyawa zuwa daidaitawa, ci gaba da haɓaka tsarin.

publications.title: Wallafe-wallafe da ra'ayoyi
publications.description: Rubuce-rubuce na fasaha da aiwatarwa daga aikin kirkire-kirkire na yau da kullun.

appliedAi.title: Tsarin AI da aka yi amfani da shi
appliedAi.description: Gine-ginen AI na samarwa wanda ya shafi hidimar samfuri, orchestration na fasali, da gwajin da aka sarrafa.

automationFrameworks.title: Tsarin sarrafa kansa
automationFrameworks.description: Kayan aikin sarrafa kansa na ciki don amincin aikawa, amsar abin da ya faru, da ayyukan injiniya masu maimaitawa.

advancedArchitecture.title: Gwajin Gine-gine na Ci gaba
advancedArchitecture.description: Bincike a cikin juriya, rarraba gine-ginen da aka inganta don aiki, haƙuri na kuskure, da sikelin.

edgeAndIot.title: Edge Computing & IoT Intelligence
edgeAndIot.description: Hankali a gefen don yanke shawara mai ƙarancin latency, sarrafa telemetry, da haɗin jiragen ruwa na na'urar.

nlp.title: Tsarin Harshe na Halitta
nlp.description: Bututun fahimtar harsuna da yawa don rarrabuwa, hakowa, fassara, da tsarin tattaunawa.

evolutionaryAlgorithms.title: Juyin Halitta Algorithms & Ingantawa
evolutionaryAlgorithms.description: Tsarin bincike da ingantawa da aka yi wahayi zuwa ga zaɓin halitta don magance ƙalubalen injiniya mai girma.

automationFrameworks.title: Tsarin sarrafa kansa
automationFrameworks.description: Muna gina tsarin aiki na yau da kullun don saki, ƙofofin inganci, da tabbatarwa bayan turawa don rage gogayya ta hannu yayin haɓaka aminci.

advancedArchitecture.title: Gwajin Gine-gine na Ci gaba
advancedArchitecture.description: Gwaje-gwajen gine-ginen mu suna mai da hankali kan dabarun lalacewar sabis, tsarin juriya na yanki, da kuma ambulaf na aiki don tsarin da ke aiki a ƙarƙashin buƙatu mai ƙarfi.

edgeAndIot.title: Edge Computing & IoT Intelligence
edgeAndIot.description: Muna tabbatar da watsa shirye-shirye da ƙirar ƙirar gefen da ke ba da damar yanke shawara cikin gida cikin sauri yayin kiyaye sarrafawa na tsakiya, dubawa, da tsarin tsarin rayuwa.

adaptiveCapacityPlanning.title: Shirye-shiryen Daidaitawa
adaptiveCapacityPlanning.description: An tabbatar da samfuran lab akan ayyukan da aka kwaikwayi sannan kuma an haɗa su cikin dabarun dandamali na atomatik.

operationalIntelligence.title: Bayanan sirri na aiki
operationalIntelligence.description: Bututun NLP suna motsawa daga gwaje-gwajen da aka sarrafa zuwa ayyukan tallafi na samarwa don saurin triage da bayyananniyar fahimta.

optimizationInDeliverySystems.title: Ingantawa a cikin Tsarin Isarwa
optimizationInDeliverySystems.description: Hanyoyin juyin halitta da aka gwada a cikin dakin gwaje-gwaje ana fassara su zuwa injunan ingantawa don tsarawa da rarrabawa.

edgeDecisioning.title: Yanke shawara na gefen
edgeDecisioning.description: IoT da gwaje-gwajen inference na gefen suna da ƙarfi a cikin sabis na ƙarancin latency tare da ƙuntatawa na aminci.

now.title: Aikace-aikacen AI Foundation
now.description: Fadada samfuran samfurin da za a iya amfani da su, ɗakunan kimantawa, da ƙa'idodin lura a cikin ƙungiyoyin samfura.

next.title: Ayyukan Injiniya masu zaman kansu
next.description: Gudanar da tsarin sarrafa kansa wanda ke rage haɗarin turawa da kuma gajarta madauki na ra'ayoyi don jigilar kaya.

twelveToEighteenMonths.title: Edge-Native Intelligence
twelveToEighteenMonths.description: Sikelin gine-ginen girgije na girgije don kusa da ainihin lokacin inference a cikin yanayin latency.

longHorizon.title: Tsarin Ingantawa na Ci gaba
longHorizon.description: Haɗa gwaji, saka idanu, da ingantawa don tsarin ya iya daidaitawa cikin aminci yayin da mahallin ke canzawa.

aiReliability.title: Tsarin AI na injiniya wanda ke ci gaba da kasancewa abin dogaro a cikin samarwa
aiReliability.summary: Hangen nesa mai amfani game da daidaita saurin gwaji tare da gudanar da samarwa.

distributedArchitecturePatterns.title: Rarraba Tsarin Gine-gine don Dandamali Masu Girma
distributedArchitecturePatterns.summary: Bayanin filin daga gwaje-gwajen gine-gine sun mai da hankali kan aiki, juriya, da sauƙin aiki.

roadmappingAppliedRd.title: Roadmapping Applied R&D for Business Results
roadmappingAppliedRd.summary: Yadda muke tsara ayyukan kirkire-kirkire don gano su motsa daga samfurin zuwa ƙimar aunawa.

cta.title: Gina tare da Horizon Innovation Lab
cta.description: Yi aiki tare da mu don tabbatar da ra'ayoyi masu ban sha'awa da sauri da kuma matsar da ra'ayoyin da aka tabbatar a cikin amintacce, tsarin samarwa mai haɓakawa.

hero.title: Tsarin AI da aka yi amfani da shi
hero.description: Cikakken bayani game da yadda Horizon ke tsarawa, aikawa, da kuma sarrafa tsarin koyon inji daga samfurin zuwa samarwa.

tags.appliedAi: AI da aka yi amfani da shi

machineLearningPipelines.title: Bututun koyon na'ura
machineLearningPipelines.description: Production AI yana farawa tare da bututun da aka sake haifuwa waɗanda ke haɗa bayanai, gwaji, tabbatarwa, da ra'ayoyi.

modelDeploymentPatterns.title: Model Deployment Patterns
modelDeploymentPatterns.description: Ana zaɓar dabarun turawa bisa ga buƙatun latency, mahimmancin kasuwanci, da rikitarwa na aiki.

mlopsOperatingModel.title: Tsarin aiki na MLOps
mlopsOperatingModel.description: Ayyukan MLOps suna tabbatar da tsarin AI ya kasance abin dogara, mai sarrafawa, da haɓakawa yayin da amfani ke ƙaruwa.

monitoringAndReliability.title: Kulawa da aminci
monitoringAndReliability.description: Observability yana rufe madauki tsakanin halayyar samfurin da sakamakon aiki.

dataAndFeatureEngineering.title: Data da Feature Engineering
dataAndFeatureEngineering.description: Ingantaccen bayanai, dubawa mai inganci, da ma'anar fasalin da za a iya sake amfani da su ƙirƙirar tushe mai aminci don horar da samfurin.

modelDevelopment.title: Ci gaban samfurin
modelDevelopment.description: Ana bin diddigin gwaje-gwaje tare da saitunan da aka sake haifuwa, ma'aunin ma'auni, da kuma kwatancen kwatancen atomatik.

validationAndSafetyGates.title: Tabbatarwa da ƙofofin Tsaro
validationAndSafetyGates.description: Samfuran 'yan takarar sun wuce aiki, ƙarfi, da kuma dubawa na manufofi kafin a amince da su don saki.

operationalFeedbackLoops.title: Operational Feedback Loops
operationalFeedbackLoops.description: Bayan turawa telemetry yana sanar da fifikon sake horar da shi, yanke shawara na baya, da kuma shirye-shiryen sake maimaitawa na gaba.

realTimeInferenceServices.title: Real-Time Inference Services
realTimeInferenceServices.description: APIs masu ƙarancin latency don aikace-aikacen ma'amala tare da atomatik, caching, da kuma lura da matakin buƙata.

batchAndStreamingPredictions.title: Hasashen Batch da Streaming
batchAndStreamingPredictions.description: Bututun da aka tsara da abubuwan da suka faru don ƙididdigar ƙididdiga a duk faɗin nazari da ayyukan aiki.

edgeAwareDeployment.title: Gefen Ge
edgeAwareDeployment.description: Tsarin hidimar girgije na girgije don yanayin da ke buƙatar ƙididdigar gida da tsarin gudanarwa na tsakiya.

ciCdForModels.title: CI / CD don samfurori
ciCdForModels.description: Ginawa ta atomatik, gwaji, da sakin ayyukan aiki suna rage haɗarin turawa yayin kiyaye saurin isarwa.

modelRegistryAndLifecycle.title: Model Registry da Lifecycle
modelRegistryAndLifecycle.description: Samfurin samfurin samfurin tare da matakan haɓakawa, layi, da ayyukan amincewa suna inganta sarrafawa da bin diddigin.

servingInfrastructure.title: Samar da kayayyakin more rayuwa
servingInfrastructure.description: Scalable hidima yadudduka tare da dabarun ƙaddamar kamar canary da inuwa suna tallafawa amintaccen canjin canji.

monitoringPillars.latencyThroughputAndCostEfficiencyTracki: Latency, Throughput, da kuma Cost Efficiency Tracking
monitoringPillars.dataQualityRegressionAlertsAndRemediatio: Faɗakarwar Ingancin Bayanai da Ayyukan Gyara
monitoringPillars.auditabilityForComplianceAndIncidentAnal: Auditability for compliance and incident analysis

cta.title: Sikelin Amfani da AI tare da Amincewa
cta.description: Idan kuna shirin ayyukan AI waɗanda ke buƙatar sakamako mai aunawa da kiyayewa na dogon lokaci, Horizon na iya taimakawa tsarawa da aiwatar da cikakken tsarin rayuwar.

hero.title: NLP na Harsuna da yawa
hero.description: Bincika ƙwarewar sarrafa harshe na halitta da kuma yadda suke haɓaka zuwa amintacce, tsarin samar da harsuna da yawa.

foundations.title: Gidauniyar NLP
foundations.description: Tsarin harshe na halitta ya haɗu da siginar harshe da ilmantarwa na inji don cire ma'ana, niyya, da tsari daga rubutu.

workbench.title: Interactive NLP Workbench
workbench.description: Yi amfani da demo don gwada gano harshe, ƙididdigar ra'ayi, hakar ƙungiyoyi, da halayen fassara a ainihin lokacin.

productionApplications.title: Ta yaya Horizon ke amfani da NLP a cikin samarwa
productionApplications.description: An haɗa ƙwarewar NLP a cikin ayyukan kasuwanci tare da tsaro na aiki da ma'auni masu inganci.

reliabilityAndGovernance.title: Aminci da Ka'idodin Gudanarwa
reliabilityAndGovernance.description: Samar da NLP yana buƙatar fiye da ingancin samfurin; Ya dogara ne akan amintattun ayyukan ƙaddamar da kuma ci gaba da tabbatarwa.

foundations.intro1: Tsarin NLP na zamani yana tallafawa sarrafa kansa, dacewar bincike, hakar ilimi, da haɗin gwiwar harsuna da yawa. Ingantaccen aiwatarwa yana buƙatar ingancin samfurin da sarrafawa mai ƙarfi.
foundations.intro2: A Horizon, muna mai da hankali kan tsarin NLP na ƙarshe wanda ya haɗu da ƙididdiga mai ƙarfi tare da lura, gudanarwa, da tasirin samarwa mai aunawa.

languageDetection.title: Gano harshe
languageDetection.description: Gano yare daga gajeren ko dogon sassan rubutu don jagorantar buƙatu zuwa bututun sarrafawa mai dacewa.

sentimentAnalysis.title: Nazarin Sentiment
sentimentAnalysis.description: Cire niyya ta motsin rai da polarity don hankalin abokin ciniki, tallafi na tallafi, da madauki na ra'ayoyin samfur.

entityExtraction.title: Cirewar Entity
entityExtraction.description: Gano abubuwan da aka tsara kamar sunaye, kamfanoni, wurare, da kwanan wata daga rubutun da ba a tsara ba.

translation.title: Fassarar
translation.description: Yana tallafawa ayyukan harsuna da yawa ta hanyar fassara rubutun da aka samar da mai amfani ko aiki yayin riƙe mahallin.

supportAndTicketIntelligence.title: Tallafi da Ticket Intelligence
supportAndTicketIntelligence.description: Rarraba buƙatun da ke shigowa ta hanyar gaggawa, niyya, da ra'ayi don hanzarta hanya da ingancin amsawa.

governedContentOperations.title: Gudanar da Ayyukan Abun ciki
governedContentOperations.description: Yi amfani da matattarar harshe da ma'auni da dubawa tare da madaidaiciyar madaidaiciya da tunawa.

textDrivenBusinessInsights.title: Rubutun Kasuwancin Kasuwancin Rubutu
textDrivenBusinessInsights.description: Tattara abubuwan da ke faruwa daga takardu, bita, da sadarwa don sanar da dabarun da yanke shawara na aiki.

evaluationByUseCase.title: Kimantawa ta hanyar amfani da shari'ar
evaluationByUseCase.description: Ana daidaita samfuran da aka kwatanta da bayanan yanki na musamman kafin yanke shawara na fitarwa.

humanInTheLoopSafeguards.title: Tsaro na ɗan adam
humanInTheLoopSafeguards.description: Hasashe mai tasiri ya haɗa da hanyoyin bita, ƙa'idodin haɓakawa, da siginar amincewa a bayyane.

continuousMonitoring.title: Ci gaba da sa ido
continuousMonitoring.description: Drift, latency, da ingancin lalacewa ana bin diddigin su akai-akai don haka sake horarwa da sake dawowa suna aiki.

hero.title: Genetic Algorithm Simulation
hero.description: Bincika ƙididdigar juyin halitta a cikin yanayi mai ma'amala kuma ku ga yadda ka'idoji iri ɗaya ke fassara zuwa tsarin haɓaka samarwa.

scientificFoundation.title: Gidauniyar Kimiyya
scientificFoundation.description: Algorithms na kwayoyin halitta sune hanyoyin haɓaka yawan jama'a waɗanda aka yi wahayi zuwa gare su ta hanyar zaɓin halitta da daidaitawa.

interactiveEnvironment.title: Interactive Juyin Halitta Environment
interactiveEnvironment.description: Gudanar da kwaikwayon don ganin motsa jiki yana inganta tsara ta tsara kuma lura da yadda matsin lamba na zaɓi ke tasiri sakamakon.

productionUse.title: Ta yaya Horizon ke amfani da wannan a cikin samarwa
productionUse.description: Makanikai na bincike iri ɗaya da aka yi amfani da su a cikin wannan demo suna sanar da bututun ingantawa da aka tura a cikin tsarin aiki.

applicationDomains.title: Yankunan Aikace-aikacen Aikace-aikacen Aikace-aikacen Aikace-aikace
applicationDomains.description: Inganta juyin halitta yana da mahimmanci musamman a cikin tsarin da ke da manufofi masu ƙarfi da ƙuntatawa masu rikitarwa.

scientificFoundation.intro1: Maimakon neman mafita ɗaya a lokaci guda, algorithms na kwayoyin halitta suna haɓaka yawan 'yan takarar daban-daban. Kowane ƙarni ana kimanta shi da aikin motsa jiki kuma an tsaftace shi ta hanyar zaɓi, ƙetare da canzawa.
scientificFoundation.intro2: Wannan ya sa su yi tasiri ga matsaloli masu girma tare da ƙuntatawa marasa layi, inda hanyoyin ƙayyadaddun ƙa

selection.title: Zaɓi
selection.description: 'Yan takarar da suka fi dacewa su tsira da rinjayar tsara ta gaba.

crossover.title: Crossover
crossover.description: An sake haɗuwa da halaye masu ƙarfi don ƙirƙirar sababbin mafita tare da ƙarfin haɗuwa.

mutation.title: Canji
mutation.description: Tsarin da aka sarrafa yana gabatar da bambancin don haka bincike ba ya tsayawa a kusa da optimala na gida.

convergence.title: Haɗin kai
convergence.description: A cikin al'ummomi da yawa, yawan jama'a suna ci gaba da samun kwanciyar hankali da ingantattun mafita.

resourceScheduling.title: Jadawalin Albarkatu
resourceScheduling.description: Muna amfani da dabarun juyin halitta don haɓaka jadawalin ƙuntatawa da yawa inda binciken ƙarfi ba zai yiwu ba.

architectureTuning.title: Tsarin gine-gine
architectureTuning.description: Ana kimanta saitunan kayan more rayuwa na ɗan takarar sau da yawa don haɓaka aiki da ingantaccen farashi.

continuousOptimization.title: Ci gaba da ingantawa
continuousOptimization.description: Ayyukan ingantawa suna gudana a cikin madauki mai sarrafawa tare da ra'ayoyin telemetry don haka tsarin ya daidaita yayin da bayanan buƙatu ke canzawa.

routeAndLogisticsPlanning.title: Hanya & Logistics Planning
routeAndLogisticsPlanning.description: Hadaddun isar da kaya da shirye-shiryen aikawa suna amfana daga binciken juyin halitta lokacin da ƙuntatawa suka canza cikin sauri.

modelAndHyperparameterSearch.title: Model da Hyperparameter Search
modelAndHyperparameterSearch.description: Binciken kwayoyin halitta na iya gano saitin samfurin ingantaccen lokacin da manufa ke da hayaniya kuma ba layi ba.

portfolioAndAllocationProblems.title: Matsalolin Portfolio da Allocation
portfolioAndAllocationProblems.description: Ingantawa a ƙarƙashin manufofin gasa za a iya tsara su azaman kasuwancin motsa jiki a cikin saitin 'yan takara.
